Settings quality-of-life, and a couple of restored bits.

## Added
- **Show/Hide toggle** on every token field (GitHub, Docker Hub, Matrix) so you
  can verify what you pasted.
- **Check button for the Docker Hub credentials** — validates the username +
  token live against Docker Hub, the same way the Ollama and Matrix checks work.

## Fixed
- Restores the **"ShipLog" display name** and the **PNG logo icon** in the
  plugin manifest (a sync mishap had reverted both).

## Install / update

Unraid → **Plugins** (or Community Applications → search **ShipLog**), or by URL:

```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```

Coming from an early date-versioned test build, remove + reinstall once. Set the
tokens under **Settings → ShipLog → Registry access** for the widest changelog
coverage — use **Show** to check them and **Check** to verify the Docker Hub pair.
